series_metadata.series_description: Shows county, taxing district, number of classes, fees by class, total fees by county. This record is used as authorization from the Liquor Control Division to the Auditor and the Treasurer of State to distribute permit fees held in the former depository trust fund, to the proper taxing district. (fna PM-214)

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: Information is sorted on diskette with a retention of . ; Paper: in office area superseded by next list
